topic: Cell A cobot LOTO before gripper service

messages.text: need to swap the gripper pads on the cell A cobot, what do I lock out?

SOP-2204: stop the program, power off the arm, lock the cell main disconnect, and isolate the pneumatic gripper supply - then bleed the gripper air to zero. the arm holds position by brake but treat gravity as stored energy
before isolating, move the arm to a low, supported rest pose so it can't drop when brakes release. then isolate, bleed, verify zero, and service
rest pose first, then isolate electrical + pneumatic, bleed to zero, verify
